Headline: # 85A Temporary Southbound Reroute near Touhy / Lehigh
ShortDescription: Southbound 85A buses are temporarily rerouted via Touhy, Carpenter, Central, over regular route, near Touhy / Lehigh.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Southbound 85A Central North buses are temporarily rerouted via Touhy, Carpenter, Central, over regular route, due to construction near Touhy / Lehigh.

Northbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #55 Garfield Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Garfield/Ashland
ShortDescription: Eastbound 55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via 55th, Ashland, 59th, Racine and 55th: due to, street blockage near Garfield/Ashland.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How will this affect my trip?

 

Eastbound #55 Garfield buses are temporarily rerouted via 55th, Ashland, 59th, Racine, 55th and over regular route: due to, street blockage near Garfield/Ashland.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.
